Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Rocket Mortgage FieldHouse
Cleveland, OH
Previous Names:
Gund Arena (Changed after 2005)
Quicken Loans Arena (Changed after 2019)
Seating Capacity: 20562
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 5
  DMB  (5)

Longest Performance:
04.24.02 - Seek Up (16:31)

Song Liberations
  10.19.24 – Burning Down the House (after 2135 days)
Venue Picture
Description
The ground breaking for Gund Arena took place in April of 1992 and it took two and a half years to build the facility. Gund Arena officially opened its doors to the public on October 17, 1994 with Billy Joel as the grand opening performer.
